title: Kazakhstan Declaration of Assets and Liabilities of a Natural Person — Schedule 250.02 (Foreign Bank Accounts and Foreign Equity Stakes)
description: The Ministry of Finance of the Republic of Kazakhstan's "форма 250.02 — Сведения о деньгах физического лица на банковских счетах ... за пределами Республики Казахстан ... и о доле участия в уставном капитале юридического лица" (Form 250.02, foreign bank accounts and foreign equity stakes), Appendix 2 to the Declaration of Assets and Liabilities of a Natural Person (Form 250.00, `kz/kgd/declaration-of-assets-and-liabilities`, GOV-4043). Filed with the State Revenue Committee (Комитет государственных доходов, KGD) as an attachment to Form 250.00 whenever the declarant marks gating item 03a (foreign bank accounts over the reporting threshold), item 03b (foreign bank accounts held by a person subject to the anti-corruption restriction, regardless of amount), and/or item 04 (equity stake in a foreign legal entity) on the main declaration. Approved as Appendix 2 to the Declaration (itself part of Appendix 10 to Order of the Minister of Finance of the Republic of Kazakhstan No. 695 of 12 November 2025), published in full, unauthenticated, on the Ministry of Justice's own legal-information system, ИПС «Әділет». This v1.0.0 models Form 250.02 in full — its own taxpayer-identification header (items 1-2, shared with the other five 250.0X schedules) and all three of its own repeating sections: Раздел В.а) foreign bank accounts over the reporting threshold (three rows — institution ID, institution name, country code, currency code, and amount), Раздел В.б) foreign bank accounts held under the anti-corruption restriction, reported regardless of amount (the same three rows and five columns as Раздел В.а), and Раздел В. equity stake in a foreign legal entity other than a joint-stock company (two rows — legal entity ID, legal entity name, country code, and share percentage) — leaving the four other companion schedules (Forms 250.03, 250.04, 250.05, and 250.06) disclosed as separate, open backlog candidates, per the parent Form 250.00 document's own description. GovSchema is an independent, non-profit standards body and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of the Republic of Kazakhstan or the State Revenue Committee.

authority.name: Комитет государственных доходов Министерства финансов Республики Казахстан (State Revenue Committee of the Ministry of Finance of the Republic of Kazakhstan)

source.documentRef: Приложение 2 к Декларации об активах и обязательствах физического лица (форма 250.00), Приложение 10 к приказу Министра финансов Республики Казахстан от 12 ноября 2025 года № 695 — форма 250.02

verification.notes: GovSchema Standard Research cycle GOV-4064, deepening Kazakhstan's Taxes vertical by authoring the third of the six disclosed companion schedules to Form 250.00 (250.01 and 250.05 already authored via GOV-4050/GOV-4057). Independently re-fetched this cycle: the schedule page image /files/1576/49/198.jpg (curl -k, HTTP 200, 157,837 bytes), read directly and cross-checked against a 3x-zoom crop of each section. Boundary-checked via its own barcode (2625002010000, encoding form 250.02), consistent with the GOV-4043 cycle's own structure list (198.jpg = Schedule 250.02). Раздел В.а) and Раздел В.б) each print exactly three blank entry rows above their own worked example (institution ID 111122223333, ROYAL BANK CANADA, CA, USD, 10 000 for Раздел В.а; 444455556666, ROYAL BANK CANADA, CA, USD, 20 000 for Раздел В.б); the equity-stake section (item 04) prints exactly two blank entry rows above its own worked example (111122223333, «Bank of Monreal», CANADA, CA, 35.000%) — a genuine structural difference in row capacity between the bank-account sections and the equity-stake section on the same page, confirmed by direct visual count rather than assumed identical to the bank-account sections' three rows. Amount columns (Раздел В.а/В.б, column F) are printed as млрд/млн/тыс digit-box groups, modelled as a single number field per this registry's established convention for such place-value digit-box groups (already applied across the KZ 220.0X and 250.0X schedule series). The equity-stake section's own share-percentage column (E) is printed as a two-group, comma-separated digit-box layout (ЦЦЦ,ЦЦЦ%); the worked example (35.000%) confirms up to three decimal places, modelled as a single number field with a 0-100 range. Country code (column D in every section) and currency code (column E in Раздел В.а/В.б) both cite the same two footnoted classifiers already established across every 250.0X schedule authored so far (Классификатор стран мира, two-letter; Классификатор валют, three-letter, Decision No. 378 of the Customs Union Commission, 20 September 2010). A genuine, disclosed form-design quirk: the equity-stake section's own column C header prints "Наименование банковского учреждения" (bank institution name) verbatim — the identical label used in Раздел В.а/В.б for the bank name column — even though this section reports equity stakes in a foreign legal entity generally (item 04's own heading: "доля участия в уставном капитале юридического лица (за исключением акционерных обществ)"), not a bank account; the worked example itself shows a bank as the legal entity («Bank of Monreal», CANADA), which is consistent with either reading and does not resolve whether the label is a copy-paste artifact from the two sections above it or a deliberate (if narrow) scope restricted to banking-sector equity stakes. Modelled as `equityStakeEntryNLegalEntityName` (matching the parent Form 250.00 schema's own `hasForeignEquityStake` gating field, worded generally, not bank-specific) with this ambiguity disclosed in the field's own description rather than silently resolved either way. No submission was made and no live kgd.gov.kz/cabinet.salyk.kz account was created or required to author this schema.

fields.name: iin
fields.label: ИИН
fields.description: The declarant's 12-digit Individual Identification Number (ИИН), the same identifier used on the main Form 250.00 declaration this schedule is attached to.

fields.name: representedPersonIin
fields.label: ИИН представляемого лица
fields.description: The 12-digit IIN of the minor and/or legally incapacitated person being represented, if this schedule is filed by a legal representative. The schedule page prints only a single IIN box here, unlike the main Form 250.00 declaration's own separate boolean gate and name fields for the same case.

fields.name: currentSheetNumber
fields.label: Укажите номер текущего листа
fields.description: The sequential sheet number of this schedule page, printed in a box at the top right of every page of this schedule (relevant when more than one page is filed to list additional rows).

fields.name: bankAccountOverThresholdEntry1InstitutionId
fields.label: Идентификационный номер банковского учреждения (строка 1)
fields.description: The identification number of the foreign banking institution reported in row 1 of Раздел В.а), the section for foreign bank accounts and other financial-organisation holdings cumulatively exceeding, across all bank deposits, 1000 times the monthly calculation index (МРП). Worked example: 111122223333.

fields.name: bankAccountOverThresholdEntry1InstitutionName
fields.label: Наименование банковского учреждения (строка 1)
fields.description: The name of the foreign banking institution reported in row 1 of Раздел В.а). Worked example: ROYAL BANK CANADA.

fields.name: bankAccountOverThresholdEntry1CountryCode
fields.label: Код страны (строка 1)
fields.description: The two-letter country code of the country where the institution in row 1 of Раздел В.а) is located, per the Classifier of World Countries (Decision No. 378 of the Customs Union Commission, 20 September 2010) — the same two-letter classifier already established across every 250.0X schedule. Worked example: CA.

fields.name: bankAccountOverThresholdEntry1CurrencyCode
fields.label: Код валюты (строка 1)
fields.description: The three-letter currency code of the account in row 1 of Раздел В.а), per the Classifier of Currencies (the same Decision No. 378 of the Customs Union Commission). Worked example: USD.

fields.name: bankAccountOverThresholdEntry1Amount
fields.label: Сумма (строка 1)
fields.description: The account balance/amount held at the institution in row 1 of Раздел В.а), printed on the page as млрд/млн/тыс place-value digit-box groups and modelled here as a single numeric amount, per this registry's established convention for such digit-box groups. Worked example: 10000.

fields.name: bankAccountOverThresholdEntry2InstitutionId
fields.label: Идентификационный номер банковского учреждения (строка 2)
fields.description: The identification number of the foreign banking institution reported in row 2 of Раздел В.а). See bankAccountOverThresholdEntry1InstitutionId for the full description.

fields.name: bankAccountOverThresholdEntry2InstitutionName
fields.label: Наименование банковского учреждения (строка 2)
fields.description: The name of the foreign banking institution reported in row 2 of Раздел В.а). See bankAccountOverThresholdEntry1InstitutionName for the full description.

fields.name: bankAccountOverThresholdEntry2CountryCode
fields.label: Код страны (строка 2)
fields.description: The two-letter country code of the institution in row 2 of Раздел В.а). See bankAccountOverThresholdEntry1CountryCode for the classifier reference.

fields.name: bankAccountOverThresholdEntry2CurrencyCode
fields.label: Код валюты (строка 2)
fields.description: The three-letter currency code of the account in row 2 of Раздел В.а). See bankAccountOverThresholdEntry1CurrencyCode for the classifier reference.

fields.name: bankAccountOverThresholdEntry2Amount
fields.label: Сумма (строка 2)
fields.description: The account balance/amount held at the institution in row 2 of Раздел В.а). See bankAccountOverThresholdEntry1Amount for the full description.

fields.name: bankAccountOverThresholdEntry3InstitutionId
fields.label: Идентификационный номер банковского учреждения (строка 3)
fields.description: The identification number of the foreign banking institution reported in row 3 of Раздел В.а). See bankAccountOverThresholdEntry1InstitutionId for the full description.

fields.name: bankAccountOverThresholdEntry3InstitutionName
fields.label: Наименование банковского учреждения (строка 3)
fields.description: The name of the foreign banking institution reported in row 3 of Раздел В.а). See bankAccountOverThresholdEntry1InstitutionName for the full description.

fields.name: bankAccountOverThresholdEntry3CountryCode
fields.label: Код страны (строка 3)
fields.description: The two-letter country code of the institution in row 3 of Раздел В.а). See bankAccountOverThresholdEntry1CountryCode for the classifier reference.

fields.name: bankAccountOverThresholdEntry3CurrencyCode
fields.label: Код валюты (строка 3)
fields.description: The three-letter currency code of the account in row 3 of Раздел В.а). See bankAccountOverThresholdEntry1CurrencyCode for the classifier reference.

fields.name: bankAccountOverThresholdEntry3Amount
fields.label: Сумма (строка 3)
fields.description: The account balance/amount held at the institution in row 3 of Раздел В.а). See bankAccountOverThresholdEntry1Amount for the full description.

fields.name: bankAccountAntiCorruptionEntry1InstitutionId
fields.label: Идентификационный номер банковского учреждения (строка 1)
fields.description: The identification number of the foreign banking institution reported in row 1 of Раздел В.б), the section for foreign bank/cash/valuables holdings of a person subject to Kazakhstan's anti-corruption restriction on opening and holding foreign accounts (Law of the Republic of Kazakhstan "On Combating Corruption") — reported regardless of the account amount, unlike Раздел В.а). Worked example: 444455556666.

fields.name: bankAccountAntiCorruptionEntry1InstitutionName
fields.label: Наименование банковского учреждения (строка 1)
fields.description: The name of the foreign banking institution reported in row 1 of Раздел В.б). Worked example: ROYAL BANK CANADA.

fields.name: bankAccountAntiCorruptionEntry1CountryCode
fields.label: Код страны (строка 1)
fields.description: The two-letter country code of the institution in row 1 of Раздел В.б). See bankAccountOverThresholdEntry1CountryCode for the classifier reference. Worked example: CA.

fields.name: bankAccountAntiCorruptionEntry1CurrencyCode
fields.label: Код валюты (строка 1)
fields.description: The three-letter currency code of the account in row 1 of Раздел В.б). See bankAccountOverThresholdEntry1CurrencyCode for the classifier reference. Worked example: USD.

fields.name: bankAccountAntiCorruptionEntry1Amount
fields.label: Сумма (строка 1)
fields.description: The account balance/amount held at the institution in row 1 of Раздел В.б). See bankAccountOverThresholdEntry1Amount for the digit-box modelling convention. Worked example: 20000.

fields.name: bankAccountAntiCorruptionEntry2InstitutionId
fields.label: Идентификационный номер банковского учреждения (строка 2)
fields.description: The identification number of the foreign banking institution reported in row 2 of Раздел В.б). See bankAccountAntiCorruptionEntry1InstitutionId for the full description.

fields.name: bankAccountAntiCorruptionEntry2InstitutionName
fields.label: Наименование банковского учреждения (строка 2)
fields.description: The name of the foreign banking institution reported in row 2 of Раздел В.б). See bankAccountAntiCorruptionEntry1InstitutionName for the full description.

fields.name: bankAccountAntiCorruptionEntry2CountryCode
fields.label: Код страны (строка 2)
fields.description: The two-letter country code of the institution in row 2 of Раздел В.б). See bankAccountOverThresholdEntry1CountryCode for the classifier reference.

fields.name: bankAccountAntiCorruptionEntry2CurrencyCode
fields.label: Код валюты (строка 2)
fields.description: The three-letter currency code of the account in row 2 of Раздел В.б). See bankAccountOverThresholdEntry1CurrencyCode for the classifier reference.

fields.name: bankAccountAntiCorruptionEntry2Amount
fields.label: Сумма (строка 2)
fields.description: The account balance/amount held at the institution in row 2 of Раздел В.б). See bankAccountOverThresholdEntry1Amount for the digit-box modelling convention.

fields.name: bankAccountAntiCorruptionEntry3InstitutionId
fields.label: Идентификационный номер банковского учреждения (строка 3)
fields.description: The identification number of the foreign banking institution reported in row 3 of Раздел В.б). See bankAccountAntiCorruptionEntry1InstitutionId for the full description.

fields.name: bankAccountAntiCorruptionEntry3InstitutionName
fields.label: Наименование банковского учреждения (строка 3)
fields.description: The name of the foreign banking institution reported in row 3 of Раздел В.б). See bankAccountAntiCorruptionEntry1InstitutionName for the full description.

fields.name: bankAccountAntiCorruptionEntry3CountryCode
fields.label: Код страны (строка 3)
fields.description: The two-letter country code of the institution in row 3 of Раздел В.б). See bankAccountOverThresholdEntry1CountryCode for the classifier reference.

fields.name: bankAccountAntiCorruptionEntry3CurrencyCode
fields.label: Код валюты (строка 3)
fields.description: The three-letter currency code of the account in row 3 of Раздел В.б). See bankAccountOverThresholdEntry1CurrencyCode for the classifier reference.

fields.name: bankAccountAntiCorruptionEntry3Amount
fields.label: Сумма (строка 3)
fields.description: The account balance/amount held at the institution in row 3 of Раздел В.б). See bankAccountOverThresholdEntry1Amount for the digit-box modelling convention.

fields.name: equityStakeEntry1LegalEntityId
fields.label: Идентификационный номер юридического лица (строка 1)
fields.description: The identification number of the foreign legal entity (other than a joint-stock company) in which the declarant holds an equity stake, reported in row 1 of the equity-stake section (item 04). Worked example: 111122223333.

fields.name: equityStakeEntry1LegalEntityName
fields.label: Наименование юридического лица (строка 1)
fields.description: The name of the foreign legal entity in which the declarant holds an equity stake, reported in row 1 of item 04. Worked example: «Bank of Monreal», CANADA. Disclosed judgment call: the printed column header itself reads "Наименование банковского учреждения" (bank institution name), the identical label used for the bank-name column in Раздел В.а)/В.б) above — an apparent copy-paste artifact from those two sections, since item 04's own section heading concerns equity stakes in a foreign legal entity generally ("за исключением акционерных обществ"), not specifically banks. The worked example itself happens to name a bank, which does not resolve whether the mislabel is unintentional or the section is deliberately scoped to banking-sector entities only; not re-confirmable from the image alone, so left as an unresolved ambiguity rather than silently renamed to match either reading.

fields.name: equityStakeEntry1CountryCode
fields.label: Код страны (строка 1)
fields.description: The two-letter country code of the country where the legal entity in row 1 of item 04 was created, per the Classifier of World Countries. See bankAccountOverThresholdEntry1CountryCode for the classifier reference. Worked example: CA.

fields.name: equityStakeEntry1SharePercentage
fields.label: Размер доли участия (строка 1)
fields.description: The declarant's percentage share of participation in the charter capital of the legal entity in row 1 of item 04, printed as a two-group comma-separated digit-box layout (up to three decimal places). Worked example: 35.000 (%).

fields.name: equityStakeEntry2LegalEntityId
fields.label: Идентификационный номер юридического лица (строка 2)
fields.description: The identification number of the foreign legal entity in which the declarant holds an equity stake, reported in row 2 of item 04. See equityStakeEntry1LegalEntityId for the full description.

fields.name: equityStakeEntry2LegalEntityName
fields.label: Наименование юридического лица (строка 2)
fields.description: The name of the foreign legal entity in which the declarant holds an equity stake, reported in row 2 of item 04. See equityStakeEntry1LegalEntityName for the full description, including the disclosed column-label ambiguity.

fields.name: equityStakeEntry2CountryCode
fields.label: Код страны (строка 2)
fields.description: The two-letter country code of the country where the legal entity in row 2 of item 04 was created. See bankAccountOverThresholdEntry1CountryCode for the classifier reference.

fields.name: equityStakeEntry2SharePercentage
fields.label: Размер доли участия (строка 2)
fields.description: The declarant's percentage share of participation in the charter capital of the legal entity in row 2 of item 04. See equityStakeEntry1SharePercentage for the full description.
